result.summary: MyRegistry exposes two developer HTTP APIs: Merchant API and Registry API; both use the same `developerKey` API key credential.

mr_developer_key.label: MyRegistry Developer Key
mr_developer_key.setup: Go to [MyRegistry Developers](https://developers.myregistry.com/) and sign in with your partner account. The docs reference a `developerKey` security scheme for the merchant and registry APIs. The API docs do not show the minting screen, but the key is the partner credential used for server-to-server integrations.
